phrases.intent_en: Ask when the jazz festival takes place
phrases.text_local: Le festival de jazz, c'est quand ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh fees-tee-VAL duh JAHZ, say KAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Jazz à Juan festival takes place every July. Book accommodation early as the town fills up quickly.

responses.english: It's in July. Check the program online.
responses.phonetic: say ahn zhwee-YAY. kon-sul-TAY luh proh-GRAM ahn leen
responses.local: C'est en juillet. Consultez le programme en ligne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there's a beach club nearby
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un club de plage près d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un kloob duh PLAZH preh dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Juan-les-Pins has many private beach clubs (plages privées) with loungers, umbrellas, restaurants, and sometimes pools.

responses.english: Yes, there are several in the area.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn plu-ZYUR dahn luh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Oui, il y en a plusieurs dans le quartier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if dogs are allowed on the beach
phrases.text_local: Les chiens sont-ils autorisés sur la plage ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay shyen son-TEEL oh-toh-ree-ZAY soor lah PLAZH
phrases.cultural_note: Most French Riviera beaches ban dogs from June to September. Outside summer, they may be allowed on certain sections.

responses.english: No, dogs are not allowed on the beach in summer.
responses.phonetic: nohn, lay shyen son ahn-tehr-DEE ahn ay-TAY soor lah PLAZH
responses.local: Non, les chiens sont interdits en été sur la plage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest public beach is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la plage publique la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah PLAZH poo-BLEEK lah ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Public beaches in Juan-les-Pins are limited. Most of the coastline is private beach clubs with paid access.

responses.english: The public beach is right there, at the end of the promenade.
responses.phonetic: lah PLAZH poo-BLEEK eh zhoost lah, oh boo duh lah proh-muh-NAD
responses.local: La plage publique est juste là, au bout de la promenade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about water sports rental options
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je louer du matériel de sports nautiques ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh loo-AY doo mah-tay-REEHL duh spor noh-TEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Water sports available include jet skiing, paddleboarding, kayaking, and sailing. Equipment rental shops cluster near the main beach.

responses.english: There are rental stands on the main beach.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day stahn duh lo-kah-SYON soor lah plazh pran-see-PAL
responses.local: Il y a des stands de location sur la plage principale.
